title: cyperus pumilus var. patens
intro: Cyperus pumilus var. patens, also known as dwarf umbrella sedge, is a small, perennial plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyperus pumilus var. patens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and infections.
